title: Methodology
description: A named, versioned analytical methodology in the shared registry. Methodology is a full typed entity (unlike Region and Theme) because it carries definition, version, parameters, and references. Registry seeded from Layer 1a §4 of SCHEMA-DESIGN-aotearoa.md (15 entries). Claim.methodology_tag references id values here; the graph builder materialises the tag to an E_follows edge.

id.description: Stable prefixed identifier following the uniform entity-ID convention (e.g. 'methodology.median_multiple_v1'). Matches the pattern required by Claim.methodology_tag (ratified Option C, 2026-04-26).

version.description: Monotonically increasing integer. Increment on any breaking change to parameters or semantics.

kind.description: Category of methodology. Controls how the methodology is applied at lint time. measurement = analytical ratio or index methodology pinned to quantitative Claims via methodology_tag (P16); graph_invariant = cross-entity structural predicate; source_typology = source/driver/actor classification enum; provenance_tier = confidence/credibility classification; systems_frame = Forrester-style structural frame (systems_model, intervention sign); layout_rule = figure-in-narrative and rendering rules.

applies_to.description: Entity types that invoke this methodology.

predicate.description: Stable predicate ID from §3 of SCHEMA-DESIGN-aotearoa.md that this methodology discharges (e.g. 'P1', 'P5prime'). Null if the methodology does not correspond to a named predicate.

discharged_by.description: Where this methodology's constraint is enforced.

parameters.description: Optional free-form parameter map for methodology-specific configuration (e.g. thresholds, regex strings). PI defines structure per methodology.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the methodology, its origin, and its analytical commitment.

source_ids.description: Sources from which this methodology is derived (e.g. lint.py line reference, original publication).
